raw_consumer_statement:
I have been disputing unauthorized charges from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on my Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX since XX/XX/year>. Despite multiple cancellation requests via email, phone, and in person, XXXX has continued to charge me weekly against my will. 

I contacted XXXX on XX/XX/year>, requesting to cancel my membership. I followed up on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, but XXXX ignored my requests. When I called their studio, I was told they could not cancel my membership over the phone and that I needed to email their billing department. I emailed them several times, but they never responded. 

Despite my repeated attempts to cancel, XXXX has continued to charge my credit card every week from XX/XX/year> through XX/XX/year>. 

Barclays ' Failure to Stop Charges I immediately contacted Barclays to dispute the charges and filed multiple dispute claims. Barclays provided me with several case numbers but has refused to take action. 

XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> CIS XXXX I also called Barclays multiple times and was told that the case was still " under investigation, '' but I have not received a resolution. Barclays has allowed XXXX to continue charging me weekly, even though they have evidence that I tried to cancel my membership months ago. 

Additionally, when I asked Barclays for contact details for XXXX to resolve the dispute, they provided me with a phone number that belonged to a completely unrelated business ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ). This made it impossible for me to resolve the issue directly with XXXX. 

Key Issues : XXXX has ignored my multiple cancellation requests via email, phone, and in person. 
Barclays has refused to issue a chargeback despite multiple disputes being filed. 
XXXX continues to charge me weekly for a service I do not use. 
Barclays has failed to provide accurate contact information for the merchant. 
It is now XX/XX/year>, and the charges have continued for over two months despite my disputes. 
Requested Resolution : Issue a full chargeback for all ILKB charges since XX/XX/year>. 
Permanently block XXXX from making any further charges on my account. 
Provide written confirmation that my dispute has been resolved immediately. 
Barclays is violating my consumer rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) by failing to properly investigate and resolve this dispute. I am escalating this complaint because Barclays continues to allow unauthorized transactions despite my ongoing dispute. 

I expect immediate resolution of this matter.
